text:
The Tax Collector's Gauntlet (税務長の籠手, Zeimuchou no Kote) is a Nen based bracer that can only be found in Greed Island. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 15, Chapter 152 

Appearance

The Tax Collector's Gauntlet has a bracer appearance and differential patterns on its top, middle, and bottom. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 16, Chapter 153 

Plot

Greed Island arc

Amid a conversation between the Bombers, Bara devises a plan to use the Risky Dice in conjunction with the Tax Collector's Gauntlet. 

Afterward, Genthru trades with Tsezguerra's team, while Sub and Bara hide in the background awaiting their chance to make their ambush after they roll the Risky Dice and use the Tax Collector's Gauntlets on the team to steal, a "Levitation Stone" card, "Witch's Rejuvenation Potion" card, "Fledgling Novelist" card, "King White Stag Beetle" card, "Pre-Order Vouchers" card, "Hypothetical T.V." card, and two copies of the "Sacrifice Armor" card. 

Card

The "Tax Collector's Gauntlet" card designated number is 89. It has a rank-limit of A-20.
